user_query: I am a professional sports bettor and I am always looking for the best odds and matches to place my bets. Can you provide me with the latest odds and matches available on Betmaster? I am particularly interested in football, basketball, and tennis. It would be great if you could also provide some statistics on the win rates of different teams and players. Thank you!

TaskList.description: Retrieve the latest odds and matches for football, basketball, and tennis from Betmaster.
Analyze the odds data to identify the best matches for betting.
Gather win rate statistics for different teams and players in the specified sports.
Present an overview of the best odds, matches, and team/player statistics for betting decisions.
